post-install-output: Add this line in assets/app.css (or your main CSS entry):

contents: transition: background-color .2s ease, border-color .2s ease, color .2s ease, transform .2s ease;
.shaka-button--secondary { background: var(--surface-page); color: var(--text-primary); border-color: var(--border); }
.shaka-button--ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--text-primary); border-color: var(--border); }
.shaka-card__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; }
.shaka-card__eyebrow { color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; }
.shaka-card__footer { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; align-items: center; }
img, picture, svg, video { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
button, input, textarea, select { font: inherit; }
Design tokens uniquement. Aucun style appliqué ici.
Personnalisation : surchargez ces variables après l'import de shaka.css.
font-family: var(--font-sans, Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif);
.shaka-inline { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; align-items: center; }
.shaka-site { display: flex; min-height: 100vh; flex-direction: column; background: var(--surface-page); }
.shaka-container { width: min(100% - 2 * var(--page-padding), var(--container-width)); margin-inline: auto; }
.shaka-flash-stack { display: grid; gap: 0.75rem; width: min(100% - 2 * var(--page-padding), 52rem); margin: 1rem auto 0; }
.shaka-footer { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-block: 2.5rem; background: var(--surface-muted); }
.shaka-footer__inner { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.shaka-footer__list { list-style: none; padding: 0; display: grid; gap: 0.5rem; }

.shaka-cta__inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); background: var(--surface-muted); }
.shaka-faq__item { padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); }
.shaka-features__grid { display: grid; gap: 1rem; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); }
.shaka-hero__inner { display: grid; gap: 2rem; align-items: center; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); }
.shaka-hero__eyebrow { color: var(--text-brand); font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; }
.shaka-logos__list { display: grid; gap: 0.75rem; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(110px, 1fr)); }
.shaka-logos__item { display: grid; place-items: center; min-height: 4rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 600; }
.shaka-pricing__grid { display: grid; gap: 1rem; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); }

.shaka-pricing-card { display: grid; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); background: var(--surface-page); box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); }
.shaka-stats__grid { display: grid; gap: 1rem; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); }
.shaka-stat { padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); background: var(--surface-muted); }
.shaka-testimonials__grid { display: grid; gap: 1rem; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); }
.shaka-testimonial { display: grid; gap: 1rem; padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); }
.shaka-testimonial__author span { display: block; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.95rem; }
